message:
test: add 16 tests for hosting provider detection functions

- Individual platform detection: detect_github_pages (docs dir, workflow
  dir without pages, empty), detect_cloudflare_pages (wrangler, empty),
  detect_netlify (config, empty), detect_s3 (deploy script, empty)
- extract_github_repo edge cases (empty string, nested path)
- obscure_id boundary (9-char input)
- detect_environment signal sorting verification
- determine_recommended_provider priority: CF > GH, GH env > git remote,
  S3 requires script signal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
